preconditions: User is unauthenticated and has not signed in
Application loads the shared Home page in guest state

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state for an unauthenticated user
steps: Open a browser session
Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Wait for the Home page to finish loading
testCases.expectedResult: The shared Home page loads successfully in guest state while the user remains unauthenticated and guest-accessible controls are displayed without any logged-in user identity visible.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button are visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Observe the Home page guest-state controls
Verify the Person/Profile button is visible and enabled
Verify the Back button is visible and enabled
Verify the Notification button is visible and enabled
Verify the Home button is visible and enabled
Verify the Customer signup button is visible and enabled
Verify the Clean survey button is visible and enabled
Verify the Site survey button is visible and enabled
testCases.expectedResult: All approved guest-state controls and shared Home shell controls are visible, enabled, and actionable while the application remains in Home guest state.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Person/Profile button from Home guest state opens the Login page or Login view
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Click the Person/Profile button once
Observe the resulting navigation state
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home guest state to the Login page or Login view while the navigation originates from the Home page resource.

testCases.title: Verify returning to Home guest state after opening the Login view keeps guest controls available
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Click the Person/Profile button to open the Login page or Login view
Use browser back navigation or approved application navigation to return to Home
Observe the Home page state after returning
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the shared Home page in guest state and the approved guest-state controls remain visible and enabled without authenticating the user.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Customer signup button from Home guest state opens the customer-search page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Click the Customer signup button
Observe the destination page
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home guest state to the customer-search page while remaining unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Clean survey button from Home guest state opens the vehicle-survey page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Click the Clean survey button
Observe the destination page
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home guest state to the vehicle-survey page while remaining unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Site survey button from Home guest state opens the survey page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Click the Site survey button
Observe the destination page
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home guest state to the survey page while remaining unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Home button remains visible and enabled while already on the Home guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Verify the Home button is visible and enabled
Click the Home button while already on the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button remains actionable and the application stays on the shared Home page in guest state without errors or unexpected redirects.

testCases.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled in Home guest state before any additional navigation
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Observe the Back button state without performing any prior navigation
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button is visible and enabled as part of the shared Home shell controls in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled in Home guest state for unauthenticated users
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Observe the Notification button
Attempt a single click on the Notification button
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible and enabled in guest state and interacting with it does not authenticate the user or expose authenticated-only controls.
